summary: Iteration 326: GLOBAL IMMERSIVE OVERHAUL - SovereignViewport.js verification. ALL 30 TESTS PASSED. Verified SovereignViewport wrapper applied to 5 modules (Yoga, Oracle, Numerology, Meditation, Crystals) with full-bleed background images, atmospheric particles, and glass-blur panels. Each module now has unique immersive backgrounds: Yoga (sunset yoga silhouette), Oracle (purple nebula), Numerology (golden cosmos), Meditation (deep space), Crystals (amethyst cave). Regression tests for Observatory, Light Therapy, Sovereign Circle, Hub, Breathing, Herbology, and Login all passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SovereignViewport.js global immersive overhaul verified. Key features: (1) SovereignViewport component wraps modules with bgImage, accentColor, particles props. (2) CSS classes: .sovereign-viewport, .sovereign-bg-img, .sovereign-vignette, .sovereign-content. (3) Background images at 55% opacity via AnimatePresence. (4) 18 atmospheric particles per module. (5) Radial vignette overlay. (6) Glass-blur panels with backdrop-filter. Login route is /auth (not /login).
